name: Apple Cheddar Shortcake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 425°F.
2. Mix biscuit mix and cheddar cheese in a large bowl.
3. Stir in milk and melted butter until combined.
4. Pour dough into two greased 8-inch layer pans.
5. Bake for 20 minutes in the preheated oven.
6. In a large saucepan, combine brown sugar, cornstarch, cinnamon, and salt.
7. Add water and cook over medium heat until clear and thickened.
8. Stir in apples, cover, and simmer until tender.
9. Spoon half of the apple mixture onto one layer.
10. Top with second layer and remaining apples.
11. Serve warm with whipped cream on top.
